mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM exam_system.sys_role r JOIN exam_system.sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.sql:
WHERE 1 = 1
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND u.status = #{query.status}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur2 JOIN sys_role r2 ON ur2.role_id = r2.id WHERE ur2.user_id = u.id AND r2.role_code = #{query.roleCode} )
mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.real_name AS realName, u.status, u.create_time AS createTime, u.update_time AS updateTime FROM exam_system.sys_user u
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC, u.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_system.sys_user (username, password, email, real_name, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{realName}, #{status})
